mapper.select: select bno from member where id = #{id}
select * from store where store_id = #{storeId} limit 1
select sm.store_id from store_member sm where sm.member_bno = #{memberBno} and sm.chk = 1 order by sm.store_member_id asc limit 1

select sc.bno, sc.store_employee_bno, sc.work_date, sc.start_time, sc.end_time, sc.work_minutes, sc.status, sc.memo, sc.part_bno, sc.created_at, sc.updated_at, sm.member_bno, m.name as employee_name, m.id as employee_id, sp.part_name, sp.color_code, sp.sort_order from schedule sc join store_member sm on sm.store_member_id = sc.store_employee_bno join member m on m.bno = sm.member_bno left join schedule_part sp on sp.bno = sc.part_bno where sm.store_id = #{storeId} and sc.bno = #{scheduleBno} and sm.member_bno = #{memberBno} and sm.chk = 1 limit 1

select f.bno, f.title, f.content, f.name, f.id, f.fill_day, f.fill_start_time, f.fill_end_time, f.fill_di_time, f.sign_day, f.schedule_bno, f.code, f.apply_start_day, f.apply_end_day, f.chk, f.apply_su, s.store_id, s.store_name, s.store_code, m_req.bno as requester_member_bno, sc.store_employee_bno, m_sc.name as schedule_member_name, m_sc.id as schedule_member_id, sp.part_name from fill f join store s on s.store_code = f.code join schedule sc on sc.bno = f.schedule_bno join store_member sm_sc on sm_sc.store_member_id = sc.store_employee_bno and sm_sc.store_id = s.store_id join member m_sc on m_sc.bno = sm_sc.member_bno left join member m_req on m_req.id = f.id left join schedule_part sp on sp.bno = sc.part_bno where s.store_id = #{storeId} and f.bno = #{fillBno} limit 1

select f.bno, f.title, f.content, f.name, f.id, f.fill_day, f.fill_start_time, f.fill_end_time, f.fill_di_time, f.sign_day, f.schedule_bno, f.code, f.apply_start_day, f.apply_end_day, f.chk, f.apply_su, s.store_id, s.store_name, s.store_code, m_req.bno as requester_member_bno, sc.store_employee_bno, m_sc.name as schedule_member_name, m_sc.id as schedule_member_id, sp.part_name from fill f join store s on s.store_code = f.code join schedule sc on sc.bno = f.schedule_bno join store_member sm_sc on sm_sc.store_member_id = sc.store_employee_bno and sm_sc.store_id = s.store_id join member m_sc on m_sc.bno = sm_sc.member_bno left join member m_req on m_req.id = f.id left join schedule_part sp on sp.bno = sc.part_bno where s.store_id = #{storeId} order by case when f.chk = 0 then 0 else 1 end asc, str_to_date(f.fill_day, '%Y-%m-%d') asc, f.sign_day desc, f.bno desc

select fa.bno, fa.w_name, fa.m_name, fa.id, fa.code, fa.schedule_bno, fa.fill_bno, fa.w_code, fa.chk, fa.resume_bno, fa.resume_title, m.bno as applicant_member_bno, m.phone as applicant_phone, m.email as applicant_email, sm.position from fill_apply fa left join member m on m.id = fa.id left join store s on s.store_code = fa.w_code left join store_member sm on sm.store_id = s.store_id and sm.member_bno = m.bno and sm.chk = 1 where fa.fill_bno = #{fillBno} order by case when fa.chk = 0 then 0 else 1 end asc, fa.bno asc
mapper.insert: insert into fill ( title, content, name, id, fill_day, fill_start_time, fill_end_time, fill_di_time, sign_day, schedule_bno, code, apply_start_day, apply_end_day, chk, apply_su ) values ( #{title}, #{content}, #{name}, #{id}, #{fill_day}, #{fill_start_time}, #{fill_end_time}, #{fill_di_time}, curdate(), #{schedule_bno}, #{code}, #{apply_start_day}, #{apply_end_day}, #{chk}, #{apply_su} )

insert into fill_apply ( w_name, m_name, id, code, schedule_bno, fill_bno, w_code, chk, resume_bno, resume_title ) values ( #{w_name}, #{m_name}, #{id}, #{code}, #{schedule_bno}, #{fill_bno}, #{w_code}, #{chk}, #{resume_bno}, #{resume_title} )
mapper.select: select * from fill_apply where fill_bno = #{fillBno} and id = #{id} and chk = 0 order by bno desc limit 1
mapper.update: update fill f set f.apply_su = ( select count(*) from fill_apply fa where fa.fill_bno = f.bno and fa.chk in (0, 1, 2) ) where f.bno = #{fillBno}
